nasb.text: Those who eat his choice food will destroy him, and his army will overflow, but many will fall down slain.

esv.text: Even those who eat his food shall break him. His army shall be swept away, and many shall fall down slain.

cnv.text: 那些吃王膳的必毀滅他；他的軍隊必被沖沒，受重傷而倒斃的很多。

ccb.text: 南方王必遭亲信暗算，全军溃败，许多人被杀。
